mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.employee_id, c.contract_no, c.contract_type, c.contract_subject, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.sign_date, c.contract_status, c.renew_count, c.industry_type, c.ext_json, c.remark, c.created_time, c.updated_time, e.name as employeeName, e.employee_no as employeeNo FROM hr_contract c LEFT JOIN hr_employee e ON c.employee_id = e.id WHERE c.id = #{id} AND c.deleted = 0

SELECT CONCAT( CASE #{industryType} WHEN 'company' THEN 'CT' WHEN 'hospital' THEN 'HT' ELSE 'CT' END, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), LPAD(COUNT(*) + 1, 3, '0') ) as contractNo FROM hr_contract WHERE DATE(created_time) = CURDATE() AND industry_type = #{industryType} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM hr_contract WHERE contract_no = #{contractNo} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM hr_contract WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND contract_status = 'ACTIVE' AND end_date >= CURDATE() AND deleted = 0

SELECT c.id, c.employee_id, c.contract_no, c.contract_type, c.contract_subject, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.sign_date, c.contract_status, c.renew_count, c.industry_type, c.ext_json, c.remark, c.created_time, c.updated_time, e.name as employeeName, e.employee_no as employeeNo FROM hr_contract c LEFT JOIN hr_employee e ON c.employee_id = e.id WHERE c.deleted = 0 AND c.contract_status = 'ACTIVE' AND c.end_date BETWEEN CURDATE() AND DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{warningDays} DAY) ORDER BY c.end_date ASC
